body_transformation: The rounded head retains its shape but gains a matte charcoal black texture with molten gold accents along the ear edges. The compact body now features cracked obsidian armor plating over the shell, revealing glowing amber fissures beneath. The curled tail tip transforms into a flickering flame-tipped appendage with molten gold sheen. Smooth shell accents evolve into jagged magma-cracked patterns with crimson lava veins glowing through the fractures.
signature_feature: Shell: obsidian armor plating with glowing amber fissures and molten gold lava veins.
